problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: The key to How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? is Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis — specifically Vagus nerve stimulation — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
